description: Engine-evaluated authority gate. The criteria carry the band ceiling for the claim; the performer submits the proposed amount as completion evidence. The rules engine settles FULFILLED when proposedAmount <= ceiling (within delegated authority) and FAILED otherwise (exceeds authority -> must escalate to the principal-gated settlement-decision). The ENGINE decides band membership from the amount; this deliberately replaces an agent-asserted `withinBand` boolean, which an agent can set false-ly to dodge the override path. Auto-gate criteria here are intrinsically terminal-determinable: proposedAmount<=ceiling has a truthful answer at completion time. | Band ceilings are OPERATOR POLICY, not an agent guess: the carrier configures a per-band ceiling table (illustrative: junior $10k, senior $50k, manager $250k, committee above) and the orchestrator supplies authorityCeiling from it — do not invent a ceiling per claim. On FAILED (over authority), open a meridian-settlement-decision-v1 and set its authorityBandCheckRef to THIS record id to route the settlement to a human supervisor.

exposureId.description: Optional exposure discriminator. One accident can have multiple exposures (e.g. own-vehicle collision + third-party property + bodily injury); set the same exposureId across the coverage/damage/authority/settlement records of one exposure so N exposures coexist under one claimNumber.
